title: CBIC Waives Merchant Overtime Charges for International Cruise Operations
content:
# CBIC Waives Merchant Overtime Charges for International Cruise Operations

Ek important update hai! Government ne international cruise operations ke liye Merchant Overtime (MOT) charges ko waive off karne ka announce kiya hai.

Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne Circular No. 27/2026-Customs dated June 15, 2026, issue kiya hai, jismein yeh clear kiya gaya hai ki international cruise passengers aur unke baggage ke customs clearance ke liye koi MOT charges nahi lagenge. Yeh exemption un Customs locations par applicable hai jo 24x7 operations ke liye notified hain.

*   **What is waived?** Merchant Overtime (MOT) charges.
*   **For whom?** Customs services rendered for the clearance of international cruise passengers and their accompanied baggage.
*   **Where?** At Customs locations specifically notified for 24x7 operations.
*   **Why?** This decision has been taken as a trade facilitation measure. Ministry of Ports, Shipping & Waterways (MoPSW), Cruise Bharat Mission aur dusre stakeholders se representations receive hone ke baad, cruise tourism ko boost karne aur passenger processing ko streamline karne ke liye yeh kadam uthaya gaya hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in)

*Published on: 16 June 2026*
